annotation_target.structure: Flowing continuation antecedent — arabesques in full voice
teaching_goals: the arabesque texture here is completely natural — it should feel effortless
the melody rides above the triplets without strain
style_tips: no special expressive gesture needed — just let it flow

teaching_notes.note: The arabesque at its most natural — like water flowing.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 41–44 of Arabesque No. 1 in E Major, view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 41–44 of the Arabesque.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 41–44.
Measures 41–44 bring back the flowing triplet character with melodic content — the arabesque texture is in full voice. The phrase feels natural and spontaneous. Let me loop mm. 41–44.
Debussy Arabesque No. 1 mm. 41–44: flowing triplet arabesques in full voice, natural melodic character.
